headline: Guy's Headphones Start Playing Music He's Never Heard, Claims It's 'From Another Dimension'
summary: The playlist includes 'The Hum of the Void' and 'Echoes from the 4th Dimension.'
fullBody: Jake McHeadphones was listening to music when his headphones started playing songs he'd never heard. 'It's called 'The Hum of the Void',' Jake said. 'I've never downloaded that.' The playlist has 47 songs from 'alternate realities.' Jake has started a podcast exploring 'interdimensional audio.' The headphones have become a cult favorite. Spotify has no record of the songs. Jake is 'spooked but intrigued.'
